offer: For small restaurants processing 10-20 orders/week, inefficient inventory management causes stockouts. We automate inventory management instead of manual inventory tracking and ordering.
problem: Inefficient inventory management leading to stockouts and over-ordering.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small restaurant owners
Contribute to Indie Hackers discussions on inventory management
DM outreach to small restaurants with demo video
Engage in community forums for restaurant management tools
try_it: Let users try simple inventory tracking for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for orders
Allow CSV import for existing inventory data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
